title: cylindropuntia ganderi
intro: Cylindropuntia ganderi, also known as the Gander's cholla, is a species of cactus in the genus Cylindropuntia, which is characterized by its cylindrical stems and sharp spines. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia ganderi include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing and tissue regeneration. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the stems in hot water or oil to create a topical ointment or salve, which can be applied directly to affected areas.
